name: pr_bd_g2
drl:
rule "R2"
salience 4
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p : T1(f0 == 6.0, f1 == 0.0)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "R6"
salience 2
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T0()
then
    insert(new T1(7.0, 3.0, true, false));
end
rule "W"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T1($x : f1)
    accumulate(T0(f0 == "zz"); $n : count())
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    T0($y : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
_finding: order-pin GUARD: a peek-batch member (t1b) is DELETED before W's pop while a fresh insert lands. A pinned pre-built order must cancel-and-splice; the deferred lazy evaluation never sees t1b at all.
